ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the county */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population count */,
  "population_white" INTEGER /* White population count */,
  "population_black" INTEGER /* Black population count */,
  "population_asian" INTEGER /* Asian population count */,
  "population_hispanic" INTEGER /* Hispanic population count */,
  "population_native_american" INTEGER /* Native American population count */,
  "population_other_races" INTEGER /* Population of other races */,
  "population_age_under_18" INTEGER /* Population under 18 years old */,
  "population_age_18_to_64" INTEGER /* Population between 18 and 64 years old */,
  "population_age_65_and_over" INTEGER /* Population 65 years and older */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "employed_males" INTEGER /* Number of employed males */,
  "employed_females" INTEGER /* Number of employed females */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate */,
  "participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income */,
  "mean_income" REAL /* Mean income */,
  "income_per_capita" REAL /* Income per capita */,
  "per_capita_income_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of per capita income */,
  "average_household_income" REAL /* Average household income */,
  "individuals_below_poverty_line" INTEGER /* Number of individuals below the poverty line */,
  "households_below_poverty_line" INTEGER /* Number of households below the poverty line */,
  "gini_coefficient_income_inequality" REAL /* Gini coefficient of income inequality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "high_school_graduates" INTEGER /* Number of high school graduates */,
  "bachelor_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of bachelor degree holders */,
  "graduate_degree_holders" INTEGER /* Number of graduate degree holders */,
  "high_school_dropout_rate" REAL /* High school dropout rate */,
  "average_class_size" INTEGER /* Average class size */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-teacher ratio */,
  "education_expenditure_per_student" REAL /* Education expenditure per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty" (
  "poverty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "below_poverty_line" INTEGER /* Number of individuals below the poverty line */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Child poverty rate */,
  "senior_poverty_rate" REAL /* Senior poverty rate */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate */,
  "deep_poverty_rate" REAL /* Deep poverty rate */,
  "poverty_gap_index" REAL /* Poverty gap index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poverty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economics" (
  "economics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "gdp" REAL /* Gross Domestic Product */,
  "industry_growth_rate" REAL /* Industry growth rate */,
  "average_house_price" REAL /* Average house price */,
  "average_rent" REAL /* Average rent */,
  "cost_of_living_index" REAL /* Cost of living index */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate */,
  "economic_growth_rate" REAL /* Economic growth rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy */,
  "obesity_rate" REAL /* Obesity rate */,
  "diabetes_rate" REAL /* Diabetes rate */,
  "heart_disease_rate" REAL /* Heart disease rate */,
  "cancer_rate" REAL /* Cancer rate */,
  "access_to_healthcare" REAL /* Access to healthcare */,
  "healthcare_expenditure_per_capita" REAL /* Healthcare expenditure per capita */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate */,
  "high_school_dropout_rate" REAL /* High school dropout rate */,
  "teen_birth_rate" REAL /* Teen birth rate */,
  "divorce_rate" REAL /* Divorce rate */,
  "single_parent_households" REAL /* Percentage of single-parent households */,
  "community_engagement" REAL /* Community engagement */,
  "social_cohesion" REAL /* Social cohesion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing" (
  "housing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "homeownership_rate" REAL /* Homeownership rate */,
  "median_rent" REAL /* Median rent */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units */,
  "rent_burden" REAL /* Percentage of households with rent burden */,
  "homelessness_rate" REAL /* Homelessness rate */,
  "affordable_housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of affordable housing units */,
  "housing_affordability_index" REAL /* Housing affordability index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("housing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "public_transport_usage" REAL /* Public transport usage rate */,
  "average_commute_time" REAL /* Average commute time */,
  "vehicle_ownership_rate" REAL /* Vehicle ownership rate */,
  "bicycle_commuting_rate" REAL /* Bicycle commuting rate */,
  "walking_commuting_rate" REAL /* Walking commuting rate */,
  "traffic_congestion_index" REAL /* Traffic congestion index */,
  "parking_availability" REAL /* Parking availability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
